summary: Market Resolver Global Service Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend displays 'Expires In' column with time values for crypto positions and '—' for weather positions. Status column shows Active/Expiring/Expired badges. Expired stat card displays count. Market resolver service running correctly at 30s interval.

market_resolver_health_tests: Market resolver total_runs field exists and increments
Market resolver recent_resolutions field is valid array
market_resolver_manual_run_tests: POST /api/market-resolver/run returns {resolved, pnl, queried, checked, duration_ms}
positions_enrichment_tests: Positions have end_date, time_to_expiry_seconds, expired, resolved fields
Crypto sniper positions (Bitcoin/Ethereum Up or Down) have non-null end_date and time_to_expiry_seconds
Weather positions have end_date=null and expired=false
resolution_trades_tests: Resolver trades (when present) have pnl field
Resolver trades (when present) have signal_reason starting with 'market_resolved:'
frontend_tests: 'Expires In' column displays '—' for weather positions
'Expires In' column displays time values (2m, 7m, 4h) for crypto positions
Table headers include 'Expires In' and 'Status' columns

critical_code_review_comments: market_resolver_service.py: Correctly implements resolution loop at 30s interval
market_resolver_service.py: _check_resolution_by_token() uses clob_token_ids for unique market lookup (not condition_id)
market_resolver_service.py: Correctly computes PnL as (settlement_price - avg_cost) * size
market_resolver_service.py: Creates TradeRecord with strategy_id='resolver' and signal_reason='market_resolved:{outcome}'
server.py GET /api/positions: Correctly enriches positions with end_date, time_to_expiry_seconds, expired, resolved
server.py GET /api/health/market-resolver: Returns complete resolver health stats
Positions.jsx: formatTTE helper correctly formats seconds to '—', 'Expired', or time strings (s/m/h/d)
Positions.jsx: statusBadge helper correctly returns Active/Expiring/Expired badges based on position state
seed_data_creation: None - used live crypto sniper and weather trader positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Resolver service verified. Key findings: (1) Resolver runs every 30s, checks expired positions, (2) Resolution requires Polymarket oracle to have resolved market (closed=true + outcomePrices 0/1), (3) Crypto positions have end_date/time_to_expiry_seconds from market metadata, (4) Weather positions have null end_date (broad fetch doesn't include it), (5) Frontend correctly displays 'Expires In' column and Status badges. Engine must be started via POST /api/engine/start before testing. Vol warmup takes ~150s (30 samples @ 5s).
notes: Resolver correctly identifies expired positions but actual resolution depends on Polymarket oracle timing. The oracle typically resolves markets a few minutes after endDate. During testing, 3 positions were expired (tte < 0) but awaiting oracle resolution. This is expected behavior.
